title: Email Hunt Foundation
description: Shared email-hunt building blocks for phishing and mailbox compromise investigations.

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Tenant, business unit, or environment selector.

parameters.name: lookback_hours
parameters.description: Hours of email and SIEM telemetry to review.

parameters.name: focus_user
parameters.description: Mailbox owner or impacted user to prioritize.

parameters.name: focus_sender
parameters.description: Optional suspicious sender address or domain.

telemetry_requirements.description: Message trace, delivery, and mailbox activity with sender and recipient context.
SIEM correlation across message delivery, links, and downstream actions.

blind_spots: Email activity in providers or forwarding paths outside Microsoft 365 will not be visible from this foundation.
